refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is crowded with multiple patients waiting. There are many people seated and some standing, indicating a high volume of patients.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see how crowded the waiting room was. There were not enough seats for all the patients, and many were left standing for a long time. This is very uncomfortable and frustrating for those who are already not feeling well.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, there's nowhere to sit and people are standing all over the place.
